description:
Recovery tonic finely ground from Red Herb. Recovers about 45 HP.
_
--------------------------

Recovery tonic finely ground from Red Herb and Yellow Herb. Recovers about 105 HP.
Weight : 10

Weight : 13

Recovery tonic finely ground from White Herb. Recovers about 325 HP.
Weight : 15
Mental recovery tonic finely ground from Blue Herb. Recovers about 60 SP.
Healing remedy finely ground from Green Herb. Cures Poison, Silence, Blind, Confusion, Hallucination.

Rare herb known for treating wounds. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Weight : 3

Rare herb known for strong wound treatment. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Weight : 5
Rare herb known for exceptional wound treatment. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Precious herb with a unique scent that refreshes the mind. Recovers a small amount of SP.
Herb that neutralizes various poisons. Cures Poison.

Fruit with sweet and refreshing aroma. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Weight : 2
Exotic fruit with a sweet taste. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Fruit with a tangy and sour flavor. Recovers a small amount of SP.
Red vegetable with a sweet and unique aroma, often used in cooking. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Purple root vegetable rich in starch and sweet in flavor, often used as food. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Well-cooked meat, looks appetizing. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Sweet and sticky liquid widely used as food and also medicinal for its high nutritional value. Recovers a small amount of HP and SP.
Processed and sterilized milk from cows. Commonly used as nutritious food for Kids. Recovers a small amount of HP.

Leaf of a flower called Hinalle. Its cool, refreshing scent eases pain and restores vitality. Recovers a moderate amount of HP.
Weight : 1
Leaves cut and gathered from a plant called Aloe. Recovers a moderate amount of HP.
Ripe fruit picked from the Mastela tree. A vibrant purple fruit with a refreshing taste. Recovers a large amount of HP.
Blessed water used for sacred rites. Cures Curse.
Mysterious medicine that cures various Status Ailment (Poison, Curse, Silence, Confusion, Blind, Hallucination).

Substance collected from honeybees, similar to milk. Known as royal jelly and said to be very nutritious. Cures various Status Ailment (Poison, Curse, Silence, Confusion, Blind) and recovers HP and SP together.

Food processed to suit monsters
taste. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Sweet and tasty candy. Recovers about 45 HP.

Lollipop-shaped candy. Recovers about 105 HP.
Weight : 4
Apple juice stored in a bottle. Easier to drink and restores better than eating the fruit itself.
Juice of Banana stored in a bottle. Easier to drink and restores better than eating the fruit itself.
Grape juice stored in a bottle. Easier to drink and restores better than eating the fruit itself.
Carrot juice stored in a bottle. Easier to drink and restores better than eating the vegetable itself.
Edible pumpkin. Recovers a small amount of HP.

Refreshing Ice Cream. Eating too much might freeze your mouth...
Weight : 8
Food made from ingredients loved by pets. Clean and tasty enough for humans to eat. Most pets enjoy this food.
Cookie baked to golden perfection, giving off a delightful aroma. Sweet flavor is excellent and restores stamina when eaten.

Piece of Cake
Slice of a large cake. Soft cream melts gently in the mouth. Restores stamina when eaten.
Processed fish meat containing the freshness of the sea. Said to create a whirlwind of flavor the moment it touches the tongue.
Same effect as Red Potion but much lighter.
Same effect as Yellow Potion but much lighter.
Same effect as White Potion but much lighter.

Food with a unique scent known to restore some SP.
Possesses strong restorative properties but works slowly.
Best consumed with water to avoid choking.

Possesses strong restorative properties but works slowly.
Best consumed with water to avoid choking.
Light to the point of feeling empty when eaten, often used for dieting by women. Said to have almost no nutritional value?

Dish from an eastern country, consisting of raw fish placed on rice mixed with vinegar. Tangy flavor blends well with the natural taste of the fish.
Traditional food enjoyed in a far eastern country, warm with flavorful meat packed inside, making it look delicious at a glance. Nowadays, various fillings are used as new alternatives.
Traditional food enjoyed in a far eastern country, warm with flavorful meat packed inside, making it look delicious at a glance. Nowadays, various fillings are used as new alternatives.
Soft, warm, and deliciously made rice cake. Extremely smooth, so swallowing without care may cause it to stick in the throat.
Crustacean with five pairs of legs, turning pink when cooked and very tasty. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Oval fruit that turns yellow and fragrant when ripe. So sour that just thinking about it makes your mouth water! Recovers a small amount of SP.
Special recovery item crafted in the Newbie Training Grounds for beginning Newbie adventurers. Recovers a small amount of HP.

Spiky fruit with a refreshing scent. Recovers a small amount of HP and SP.
Weight : 6
Edible crop with a mild flavor, easy to store and long preserved, making it a staple food. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Popular red fruit with a sweet and tangy flavor. Recovers a small amount of SP.
Fish used in various dishes depending on cooking method. Often categorized into white meat and blue-backed fish. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Bread baked to an appealing color with a pleasant aroma. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Mushrooms that vary widely in type and flavor. Used in cooking or eaten grilled. Recovers a small amount of HP.
Round orange fruit with refreshing flavor and scent, eaten fresh or used for juice or jam. Recovers a small amount of HP and SP.
Enchanted wing plucked from a bird, allowing warp to a random place on the map. Allows warping to a random location on the map.
Enchanted fragment of a Butterfly Wing. Teleports the user to their saved location.

Ancient box emitting a mysterious blue glow. Something might be inside when opened.
Weight : 20
Branch of an ancient tree that has gained magical power over countless ages. Its mysterious force can summon a living being.
Medicine made mainly from a plant called Ment. Eases pain for a certain time, so it is also used as an analgesic.
Peeled stem of Aloe with its inner gel stored inside. Extremely sour taste and sharp smell may be off-putting, but once tried, the flavor is said to be unforgettable.

Fruit of the Yggdrasil tree, source of another world. After savoring its fantastical, primordial flavor, one finds their life force overflowing. Recovers all of the user's HP and SP.
Cooldown : 5 seconds
Weight : 30

Seed of the Yggdrasil fruit, origin of this world. Gentle, nutty aroma restores one's vigor. Recovers half of the user's HP and SP.
Cooldown : 3 seconds
Forbidden charm that brings back the dead while keeping them as dead. Those who rise exist between life and death, becoming undead Dega.
Leaf of Yggdrasil, holding powerful life energy. Can revive a character who is unable to fight.

Magnifier. Allows detailed inspection of objects to appraise them. Appraisal is also possible with [Ctrl+Right-click].
Weight : 0.1
Portable Furnace. Used for metal production. Disappears after one use.
Hammer made from Steel. Can be used to forge weapons. Disappears after one use.
Hammer made of gold. Can be used to forge weapons. Disappears after one use.

Hammer made from Oridecon. Can be used to forge weapons. Disappears after one use.
Weight : 40
Notebook that seems as though it once held cards. Its worn pages give off a mysterious aura.
An Old Scroll filled with unfamiliar writing when unrolled.

Unripe sour and astringent apple. Monster Poring loves it.
Event monsters and slave monsters cannot be tamed.
Beverage made from the juice of a fruit called Orange. Monster Drops loves it.
Extremely bitter herb that makes anyone grimace when eaten. Monster Poporing loves it.
Carrot shimmering with rainbow colors. Gentle fragrance is captivating. Monster Lunatic loves it.
Handsome Stylish Young Worm whose red bow tie around the neck is a charming point. Monster Picky loves it.
Heavily decayed fish. Monster Chonchon loves it.
Iron so badly rusted that it is difficult to use. Monster Steel Chonchon loves it.
Juice made from Animal Blood favored by monsters. Monster Hunter Fly loves it.
Specially processed sweet and rich milk. Monster Savage Babe loves it.
White bone thoroughly dried in the sun. Monster Desert Wolf cub loves it.
Flower said to bloom from Singing Plant. Monster Rocker loves it.
Green moss grown with early morning dew. Monster Spore loves it.
Plant containing deadly poison. Monster Poison Spore loves it.
Plump, healthy earthworm. Monster Peco Peco loves it.
Roasted Sweet Potato, roasted to perfection. Monster Smokie loves it.
Top-grade Banana produced in tropical regions. Monster Yoyo loves it.
Symbol of strict organizational discipline. Monster Orc Warrior loves it.
Old undelivered letter with an unknown recipient. Monster Munak loves it.

Old Broom
Old broom passed down through generations. Monster Dokebi loves it.
Silver dagger symbolizing purity. Monster Sohee loves it.
Bracelet that looks magnificent yet somehow sorrowful. Monster Isis loves it.
Very Shining Stone. Monster Green Petite loves it.
Dark Contract. Monster Deviruchi loves it.
Forbidden book containing secret techniques for demon summoning. Monster Baphomet Jr. loves it.
Device used to hatch monster eggs. Easy to carry and allows awakening your resting pet inside the egg.
Box containing a gift when opened. What it holds cannot be known until the moment it is opened.
Potion infused with ingredients that enhance focus. Increases ASPD when consumed. Usable by All Jobs.

Mysterious potion that induces an awakened state. Increases ASPD when consumed. Usable only by characters Lv.40 or higher, except Acolyte/Priest/Bard/Dancer.
Required Level : 40

Powerful potion that heats the blood and drives the user into a berserk state. Increases ASPD when consumed. Usable only by characters Lv.85 or higher belonging to Swordman Class/Rogue/Mage/Wizard/Merchant Class/Gunslinger Class.
Required Level : 85

Statue said to strengthen the unity of a group. Those who see it feel a stronger bond forming within.
Weight : 50
Charm said to contain the feelings of an unknown girl. Monster Bongun likes it.

Round copper badge once given to officials traveling on government duty in an eastern country. They shouted "The Secret Royal Inspector arrives!" while holding it. Movement speed increases for a short duration.
Terrifying poison contained in a skull-shaped bottle. Anyone who drinks it will likely Suicide.

A photo album containing beautiful memories of the honeymoon. The moment you open it, you can briefly experience the mood at that time. 
(Only for married people)
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Earth-property magic [Earth Spike] Lv.3.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Water-property magic Cold Bolt at Lv.5.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Fire-property magic [Fire Bolt] Lv.3.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Fire-property magic Fire Bolt at Lv.5.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Wind-property magic [Lightning Bolt] Lv.3.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Wind-property magic Lightning Bolt at Lv.5.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Ghost-property magic [Soul Strike] Lv.3.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Ghost-property magic [Soul Strike] Lv.5.
The paper contains a magician's spell made using ancient magic. Use level 5 fire attribute magic fireball.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Fire-property magic Fire Wall at Lv.5.
Scroll containing a spell crafted from the essence of ancient magical studies. Allows use of the Water-property magic [Frost Driver] Lv.1.
Item created to lure Thief Bug by imitating their behavior.
Fresh blood collected from livestock and stored in a bottle. Favored by certain beasts and monsters.
Common plant seen everywhere in the world. Though lacking fragrance and color, its leaves bring joy to many.
Plant said to bloom shyly only in deep forests. Its season is limited, making it difficult to find.
Plant with three heart-shaped leaves that blooms white flowers in June and July. Occasionally a four-leaf one appears, symbolizing great fortune.
Uniquely four-leafed Clover. Said to bring great luck to the one who finds it.
Mystical plant said to sing sorrowful songs alone on bright moonlit nights. Legend tells of a woman who waited endlessly for a departed lover, eventually turning into this plant.
Pure white flower said to blur even memories. Contains components believed to ease pain.
Flower with a strong fragrance, used as seasoning in some dishes. Excessive intake is said to cause Hallucination.

Illusion Flower
Legendary plant said to shine more brilliantly than anything else in the deep night. It blooms alone in remote forests, glowing brightly. Some say heaven can be seen within its light, but once the flower is plucked, the glow vanishes forever.
Newly sprouted young plant. Fresh and pure in appearance.
Nameless flower with neither fragrance nor thorns.
Empty bottle containing nothing. Seems suitable for filling and carrying something inside.

Brilliant metal shining with dazzling light. Ancient manuscripts say it appears before one who can change this world
s fate, accompanying their destiny.
Weight : 100

Ore infused with magical power. When magic is cast, it shatters by taking the spell
s backlash in the caster
s place.
An ore with magical power that can counteract the reaction force of magic on behalf of the caster when using magic.
An ore with magical power that can counteract the reaction force of magic on behalf of the caster when using magic.
Gemstone with a deep crimson hue.
Gemstone with a violet hue.
Gemstone with a sky-blue hue.
Gemstone with a green hue.
Gemstone with a pink hue.
A deep crimson gemstone.
A deep crimson gemstone that radiates an unknown power.
Gemstone with a red hue.
Gemstone with a blue hue.
Gemstone with a white hue.
Gemstone with a yellow hue.
Gemstone with a teal hue.
Gemstone that shines with a transparent, shimmering light.
A gem that exudes transparency and exquisite light.
A gem that exudes transparency and exquisite light.
A gem that exudes transparency and exquisite light.
Red picture frame, suitable as a gift.
Ceramic piece with a calming blue sheen, said to be crafted by a famous artisan from a small eastern country.
Pure white plate with a clean finish, suitable as a gift for women.
Black ladle made from a special material, light yet sturdy.
Holder used to store writing tools, suitable as a gift for students.
Accessory rarely made for wealthy ladies to enhance their appearance, produced using animal fat or plants.
Stuffed doll shaped like a rabbit, made from fabric and cotton, suitable as a gift for young girls.
Doll modeled after the fairly popular monster Poring.
Doll modeled after the monster Chonchon, adored passionately by certain eccentric people.
Doll modeled after the monster Spore, which lives in damp places.
Bundle of flowers tied together, often used to express love or gratitude. Said that there is hardly a woman who would dislike receiving this.

Small Bouquet carried by brides at weddings. A distant country
s legend says that the woman who catches it will be the next to marry.
Small glass bead often used as a toy by mischievous children.

Crystal Mirror. Essential for women
s adornment and considered more luxurious than items made of ordinary glass.
Magically enchanted Everlasting Rose. Only a few are ever made, making it extremely expensive, but as a symbol of unfading eternal love, it is highly sought after by young men.
Rose carved from ice, created by a renowned sculptor from a cold region, making for a unique gift.

Doll modeled after a mountain goat, created as a side project during a doll maker
s experimental work.

Doll modeled after Mummy, created as a side project during a doll maker
s experimental work.

Doll modeled after Rocker, which roams the plains playing instruments at leisure. Its Unchained Serenade sometimes earns the resentment of farmers during harvest season, yet it is surprisingly popular thanks to its gentle and kind-looking appearance.

Doll modeled after Yoyo, which lives in groups deep within forests. Yoyo is highly intelligent, can become very friendly with people when well tamed, and is popular among young women and girls thanks to its cute appearance.
Doll modeled after Smokie, which lives in the forest. Surprisingly popular among men.
Unrefined ore containing the metal known as Oridecon, the so-called divine metal. The amount of Oridecon within is small and extremely difficult to refine, making it highly valuable and very rare.
Ore that can be refined into Elunium. Used primarily in armor forging to produce Elunium.

Research journal lost by Archeologist.
Weight : 0
Emblem proving membership in the royal investigation unit, crafted as a portable necklace.
Sample collected for research on Familiar.
Sample collected for research on Thief Bug.
Ymir Heart Fragment once stored beneath Prontera Castle.

Shining Armor
Shining Armor crafted by a blacksmith at the request of Merchant. Designed more for display than battle
hopefully no one actually wears it into combat.

A braided pigtail that has been cut from the head of a young girl.
Used for Hair Styling.
Can be sold to the Collector.
A root from a tree which can be used to make medicine or rope.
The severed tongue of a reptile.
The severed tail of a scorpion.
A stem from a plant which can be used to make medicine.
A single scale from a Worm Tail.
A viscous plant substance used in the production of certain types of goods.
A bundle of frog eggs.
A small crystallization created by some monsters.
Crystals obtained from some monsters can be purchased from collectors.
Crystals obtained from some monsters can be purchased from collectible merchants.
Crystals obtained from some monsters can be purchased from collectors.
The sharpened tooth of a bat.

Fluff
A clump of monster fur and fuzz that can be used to make thread and fabric.
Skin from a larva that has been shed or peeled off.
A bird's feather that can be used in decor or in fabric creation.
A sharp talon from a bird's foot.
A webbed foot cut from a monster's hind leg.
Animal hide that can be used in making clothes, coverings or bedding.
A claw severed from a wolf's paw.
A spore discharged from a mushroom.
A cuspid wrenched out of from a gruesome orc's jaw.
A symbol which represents evil.
Butterfly wing powder that sparkles in the wind.
A bird's beak.

Antennae that serve as sensory organs for insects.

Immortal Heart
A heart that will never stop beating.
Old, dirty bandage that's so soiled, it's almost worthless.
A small sculpture that serves as the token for every true orc warrior.
A bone taken from an undead skeleton.

A box that is buried with the dead. It contains precious items pertaining to a dead individual.
This is considered food for Mummy pets.
A hard shell that's used as protection.
A shell made from hardened scales that's used as protection.
A sharp, poisonous fang.
A mysteriously sticky liquid.
A stinger from a hornet or bee.

A prehensile tail from a monkey.
A solid, durable shell that's used as protection.
A piece of iron shaped to fit on a horse's hoof for its protection.
A leaf with magical properties. Smokies use this to change form or become invisible.
A hard, spiral shaped shell used by snails.
A hard and sharp horn.
A bear's foot that has a unique flavor and supposedly has the power to restore male vigor.
A feather that boasts full, lustrous barbs used for making clothes of the highest quality.

The heart of a mermaid.
Used for Alchemist skills.
The fin of a fish.
The fin of a fish.
A sharp needle from a Muka..
A heart constructed entirely out of stone..
A shimmering, reflective scale.
Skin shedded from an insect.
A part of a fish's breathing apparatus.
A putrid, incredibly pungent corpse's nail.
A complete set of corpse's teeth. Well, as complete as it can get.
A decaying scale with a horribly offensive odor.
A crustacean's claw.
The shell of a marine mollusk.
A flexible, prehensile, and boneless appendage.
A scale that is much sharper than a razor.
A hard crab shell that smells horrible.
A hard shell taken from a dead clam.
Muscular and fatty clam tissue that can be cooked in all sorts of ways.
Remove the turtle shell from the beach and dry it in the sun. Because it is quite hard, it can be used for various purposes after processing. Sold to collectibles dealer.

An emblem given to an orc warrior that is proof of his heroism.
Can be sold to the Collector for a good price.
A valuable metal in bullion form. It's used to make coins, jewelry, and gaudy false teeth.
This colorless liquid is the secret behind the addictiveness of beers and wine.
A liquid with unique scientific properties. It's difficult to mix in water and is normally diluted in a solution. Can be diluted to create Counteragent.

A liquid with interesting characteristics and many possible applications.
Can be diluted to create Mixture.

A mixture of chemical substances that can only be produced by the most intelligent individuals.
Used for Hair Styling and Dye.
A special compound that has applications that can only be understood by keen minds schooled in science.
Red-colored dye that is made from ground red herbs.
Yellow-colored dye that is made from ground yellow herbs.
Blue-colored dye that is made from ground blue herbs.
Green-colored dye that is made out of ground green herbs.
Orange-colored dye that is made from a mixture of ground red and yellow herbs.
Purple-colored dye that is made from a mixture of ground blue and red herbs.
White-colored dye that is made out of ground white herbs..
Black-colored dye that is made from a variable mixture of ground herbs.

A widely known blessed metal to be used for refining and strengthening a weapon.
Can refine Lv.3 and Lv.4 weapons.

A very light, non-toxic metal used for refining and toughening armor.
Can refine armor.

A smithing tool on which heated metals are placed so that they can be shaped by hammering.
This is required when crafting weapons.

A smithing tool made from pure oridecon on which heated metals are placed so that they can be shaped by hammering.
Weight : 70

A smithing tool made from pure gold on which heated metals are placed so that they can be shaped by hammering.
Weight : 90

A vivid red ore that glows from inside with an orange yellow light.
Can be refined into the mineral known as Flame Heart.

A sky colored ore that glows with the light of the deep ocean depths.
Can be refined into the mineral known as Mystic Frozen.

A lemon colored ore that contains a pale, greenish light.
Can be refined into the mineral known as Rough Wind.

A blue-green ore imbued with a faint, mesmerizing light.
Can be refined into the mineral known as Great Nature.
A dark red, heart-shaped stone formed from red blood ore.
A light blue, crystal formed from crystal blue ore.
A pale green, lightning bolt-shaped stone formed from wind of verdure ore.
A citrus-colored, bud-shaped stone formed from green live ore.
A malleable, silver-white metal that's very light weight and easy to temper.

An iron and carbon alloy known for its structural durability.
Can be used to craft powerful weapons and armor.

A small stellar crystal, fallen from the heavens.
Enhances weapon durability when used in weapon crafting.
Refined star crumb.

An impure ore that forms iron after being refined.
This is considered food for Steel Chonchon pets.
Can be refined to obtain pure iron.

A black mineral substance that can form steel once it is combined with iron.
Can be refined together with iron to produce Steel.
A token which shows a knight's loyalty to his lord.

A hammer used blacksmiths for refining.
Weight : 80
A spellbook containing powerful, ancient magic.
A mysterious necklace that is rumored to possess the power of clairvoyance.
A necklace given by a master once one earns the honor of joining the Assassin Guild.
A figure of a hand that contains great religious symbolism.

A metal that can be used to strengthen and upgrade weapons.
Can refine Lv.1 weapons.
Can refine Lv.2 weapons.
Skin cut from the neck of a lizard.

Ant Jaw
A tough, sharp jaw from an ant.
A freshly cut tongue with a disgusting coating of sticky saliva.
A thin rat's tail.
The plucked whiskers of a mole.
A mole's claw that is sturdy enough to dig into the ground.
A woody stem from a tree that's useful for lumber.
Lustrous, well-brushed hair cut from a virgin.
The horn from a Dokebi which are rumored to bring great fortune to their owner.
A set of tails that used to belong to a nine tailed fox.

A tiger's hide that's soft, furry, nice and feral.

Roots, which resemble human legs, that almost look capable of walking.
A dragon's cuspid that is sharp enough to pierce through dragon scales.
A dragon's iridescent scale that is tough enough to protect from weather and most forms of harm.
A tail cut off from a dragon that, sadly, will never grow back.
Horns sliced off the head of a little demon.
Wings from a little demon, which look like those of a small bat.
A moustache shaved off an old fairy that has somehow maintained its entire shape and form.
A portable case with glass panes that allow some contained light to illuminate dark areas.
A hind leg that has been cut from a bug.
A thick, sharpened fingernail from an orc.
A cuspid pulled out of a cursed orc's mouth.
A ceremonial mask used by an ancient shaman.
The hair cut from a medusa head, which is essentially just a bunch of snakes.
A traditional skirt that symbolizes virginity.
A bunch of tough, strong tendons.
A weird organic clump which is the brain of a Marine Sphere.

Single Cell

A sharp, serrated tooth pulled from the mouth of a giant deep sea fish.
A set of fat lips cut from a giant deep sea fish.

A straight bladed sword that the Japanese samurai depended on during battle.
A one-handed sword with an elaborately designed hilt.

A one-handed, ancient Korean sword that is said to have the mysterious power to control minds.
INT +3.
A heavy one-handed cavalry sword with a slightly curved blade.
A powerful one-handed sword with a decoratively wavy, flame-like blade.

A long sword with the power of water spirit and a blue blade. 
When performing a normal attack, there is a low chance of casting Ice Arrow Lv3 on the enemy. 
When attacking physically, there is a certain chance to freeze the enemy. 
When attacking physically, there is a low chance of freezing yourself. 
Learn Ice Arrow Level 3.

A one-handed, formal dress sword imbued with fire.
Has a low chance to autocast [Fire Bolt] Lv.3 when dealing physical attacks.
[Fire Bolt] Lv.3 can be used.
Element : Fire
Weapon Level : 4

A one-handed sword popularized by its use by sea adventurers.
[Bash] skill Lv.5 can be used.
STR +2.
DEF +1.

A sword with an invisible blade that has no form. Attacks the target's mind, causing it to suffer a mental breakdown. 
Cannot be destroyed. 
When hitting the target, your own SP will be consumed by 1, and there is a certain chance that the opponent's SP will be consumed by 30%.

A spectacular sword with a blade forged out of meteorite that shines with starlight during the night.
Has a 5% chance to inflict Stun when attacking. Unbreakable.
ATK : 140
Required Level : 45
Equippable by : Novice Class

ATK +20, HIT -30, FLEE -60

DEF +5.

Sword named after a renowned eastern bladesmith. Often called a cursed blade, yet its power cannot be ignored.
CRIT +30%.
Increases ASPD (After Attack Delay -8%).

A legendary blade containing the soul of a great commander, fusing power and beauty into a rare masterpiece.
FLEE +30.

Attack speed increased (delay after attack reduced).

INT+1
Eggshell made from a colorful, unknown egg. Surprisingly large, even those with big heads can wear it with confidence. Cannot be refined since it will break if hammered.
Cute hairpin decorated with heart-shaped symbols of love, arranged in a charming pattern. Makes the wearer look extra adorable.
Said to have been worn by a legendary heroine of ancient times. Her fighting style captivated everyone who witnessed it.
Mask said to have been worn by a tragic protagonist from some tale. Staring at it for too long makes their sorrow feel as if it seeps into your own body.

Magician Hat that looks like a rabbit might jump out the moment you reach inside. Fairly sturdy and not easily broken.
DEX +1, AGI +1, SP +50.
Hat once worn by Bongun, featuring a half-torn talisman on the front. Surprisingly sturdy, and the torn charm even helps keep it out of the wearer's line of sight.
Sunglasses with a surprisingly comfortable fit and attention-grabbing effect beyond expectations. Their refined style helps the wearer look effortlessly cool.
Headband with bold, flowing stripes that stand out.
Headband in a slanted blue design that catches the eye with its stylish shape.

Hat that looks like it could be seen in a distant land and symbolizes the sun. Tougher than it appears.
STR +2, Cannot be Refined.
Position : Upper, Lower
Hairpin shaped like a red flower in full bloom, used to hold back loose strands of hair.
Cool summer straw hat that makes you want to cut grass and enjoy the feeling of harvest.
White Bandage strips crossed into a simple X shape. Perfect for acting as if you are injured.
Leaf said to be placed on the head when Smokie transforms. It seems this transformative power is exclusive to Smokie.

A helmet shaped like a plump, appetizing blue fish. The fishy smell is probably just your imagination.
Increases damage to Fish Monsters by 10%.
Part of traditional attire from a hot region, this hat features a wide, tapered conical brim.
Mask modeled after those worn by a certain assassin squad to conceal their identity. Wearing it somehow makes you feel nimbler.
Burning resolve and determination are embodied in this Headband. Wearing it makes you want to clench your fists without realizing it.

Training method for learning a calm and proper walking posture: balance an apple and a book on your head and walk without dropping either.
Good practice for those who lack caution.
Fur Hat designed with the sole purpose of keeping head warm. Some people seem to wear it more for style than insulation.
Hairpin in the adorable shape of a scarlet tulip flower.
Headband made using mushrooms said to randomly sprout on heads left too long in damp, shady places. Naturally, they are not edible.
Small pair of red ribbons that serves as a charming accent, making young girls look even cuter.
Mask with eyes and mouth shaped the same, giving a perfectly blank, detached expression. Suits those moments when you are forced to listen to a painfully unfunny joke.
Mask with a wide-eyed, round expression. Try wearing it when something truly surprising happens.
Mask perfect for when something is so annoying or unfunny that it just makes you sick of it. That is pretty much its only purpose.
Mask that conveys the firm resolve befitting Goblin leaders. Still, in the end, it is just Goblin.
Hat worn by cathedral nuns, symbolizing modesty and self-restraint by keeping the hair concealed.
A dark mask worn by assassins to conceal their faces. For some reason, wearing it makes one feel emotionally numb.
A pacifier used to soothe children. It would look adorable on a child character!
Item shaped after Angry Mouth, enabling various expressions like an angry cat or an angry rabbit.

A fruit peel known for being slippery when stepped on. Wearing this in battle seems to irritate opponents.
Triggers Auto-Spell Provoke Lv 3 with a certain chance when performing physical attacks.

A mask symbolizing Zealotus, the mistress of the Glast Heim Underground Prison. Wearing it gives the unsettling feeling of looking down on humans.
Physical damage to Demi-Human enemies +5%.
Damage Taken from Demi-Human Enemies -5%.

A headpiece blessed by the guardian angel of Super Novice. Kissing this ornament might feel like receiving an indirect kiss from an angel.
SP recovery rate +5%.
A doll modeled after the popular monster Marionette. Wearing it gives a slight chill on top of the head.
A very sturdy helmet made of bone. Though heavy and difficult to wear, its defensive capability is exceptional.
Can be identified by using a Magnifier.

The hat of the monster Youjun. Old and loose-fitting, yet surprisingly strong.
MDEF +3, cannot be refined.
Resistance against Demon type enemies +10%.

The true helmet of Orc Hero. However, its size is so large that it might strain the wearer's neck.
Has a chance to cast Weapon Perfection Lv 3 when performing attacks.

Used to tie and hold hair in place, with a small ribbon on top to add extra cuteness.

HIT+3.

Damage taken from Earth-property monsters -5%.

One of the hardest metals found in Aeshvakhum. It was too hard to refine, but after continued research, weapon refinement has recently become possible. It can refine Lv. 1~4 weapons with a refine level of +10 or higher.

Collected from cutting off the thin, long and light dragonfly wings. Can't seem to equip it on the back.
Sea-Otter Leather that looks warm enough to make fine clothing. Its softness can be felt just from looking at it.
A miraculous lump of ice that will never melt.
Broken stones.  Comes in beautiful patterns and can be sold to stone collectors.
It looked like wood that had been violently burned by fire and then pulled out.  Although the purpose is unknown, it can be sold.
Broken pieces of armor that can no longer be used.  The scrap metal dealer might buy it.
The cracked shell of a turtle.  Can be sold at a certain price.  It seems that it was also used when doing astrology in the past...

Tattered and worn clothing scraps. No one knows who buys them, yet they sell surprisingly well.

s Jewel

s Gauntlet

Rusty old darts.  I heard that darts enthusiasts will buy it.
Brilliant gem said to have formed from the tears of Goddess Freyja. Merely gazing upon it is enchanting.
Steel gloves said to have been worn by Thor when he hurled his hammer. Sturdy and practical in appearance, yet cannot be worn.
Brutal torture device said to have been used on women in a distant era. Their screams seem to echo from within even now.
Gear-shaped object with no identifiable purpose. It must serve some function, but no one knows what that might be.
Ornate decorations made of silver. Can be fitted onto various things to create stylish effects.
Masterpiece sculpture crafted by an artisan who depicted the wrathful visage of Valkyries gathering warriors.
Feather said to have fallen from an angel. Its authenticity cannot be confirmed.

Curious item said to contain the sound of a cat
s footsteps, gathered and condensed into a tangible form.
Collection of beards supposedly plucked from women. Surely they must have been rather masculine.
Root-like formation said to have existed since the dawn of stone. Worth digging up stones along the roadside to find it.
Bottle sealed with the soul said to dwell within fish. Its faint, transparent blue glow is beautiful.
Long, narrow bottle said to contain saliva shed by birds.
Bundle of powerful Bear Tendon. Shows remarkably elastic form.
Bead symbolizing the sun god, glowing with dazzling golden light.
Breath said to be exhaled by wandering souls. Touching it chills the living to the bone.

Snow Crystal
Large crystal formed from accumulated falling snow. Ice Crystal, always hexagonal, brings a sense of warmth to those who gaze upon it.
Bottle containing an image foretelling an approaching, powerful storm.
Bottle capturing the image of gentle waves brushing against the feet on a clear day at the seaside.
Sculpture depicting the rough waves crashing against the coast on a windy day.
Crafted by an artisan inspired by air that moves unseen yet never ceases.
Ember not fully extinguished, faintly glowing red as it clings to the last of its oxygen.
Weathered magic circle whose purpose can no longer be discerned. The Magic Academy buys them at high prices.
Leaf shimmering with razor-sharp blue light. Getting cut by it hurts terribly.
Fragments of the shield. Pretty solid.
The spear cone fragments emit cold blue light.
Broken sword cracked beyond further use. Nearly a piece of scrap Cheol-i.
Once symbol of Pharaoh, now shattered and barely able to exert any of its former power
Golden mask said to have been worn by a certain Pharaoh. Its shape and color are splendid, yet the fact that it is a death mask is unsettling.
Torn magic tome once called the lifeline of a wizard. Its owner is unknown, and the contents are far too damaged to read.
Tissue forming the body of mushrooms or molds.

Once a Honey Jar filled with honey, now completely emptied
someone must have eaten it all.
Piece cut from beneath Dragon Scale after removing the scale itself.
Exceptionally sharp Scorpion Claw, gleaming with a slick sheen.
Enormous mass of Jellopy, though no one knows how or where it was formed.
Book describing methods for producing alcohol.
Book detailing how to create Bottle Grenade. Not recommended for use in demonstrations.
Book explaining how to manufacture Acid Bottle. Hydrochloric acid is highly corrosive, so handle with care.

Book describing how to create a bottle containing carnivorous plants. These are not simple insectivores
handle with caution.
Book outlining the process of crafting naval mines. A mine is a bomb that floats in air or water and detonates on contact. Use extreme caution when making them.
Book recording how to produce Coating Agent. Applying the coating leaves a glossy, polished finish.
Book describing how to brew slim potions. Contains knowledge to create potions enjoyed by many users.

Medicine Bowl

Lighting the fuse and throwing it will engulf the surroundings in flames.

Target struck by this bottle will suffer severe wounds. Never throw it at people.

Thrown onto the ground, it instantly sprouts into a man-eating plant that attacks any nearby creature.

Bottle containing a shimmering substance with a dazzling glow that captivates the eyes.
Extraordinary seed radiating abundant vitality even at a glance.
Dawn dew gathered upon Yggdrasil Berry.
Embryonic form of some unknown being.
Capable of sustaining life even for someone near death, and able to nurture embryos placed inside.
Manual describing the method for producing standard potions.
Made from chopped bamboo. Bamboo is inherently hollow inside and is famous for its straight growth and fast growth rate.
After making the paper, in order to prevent water from penetrating, drizzle it with oil to give it a slightly yellowish sheen.
Make the poison contained in the poison into powder. If you add it to water and drink it, it will definitely make you miserable.
Made from zipper bear fur, it looks warm but must smell stinky.
Put the fragments of the cloud into a bottle. The fragments in the bottle will appear in a geometric state, which will make people ecstasy when they see it accidentally.
Very strong and sharpened tentacles. The sharp corners are ground like blades.
Peach so hard that it could deflect blades. Cannot be eaten, but would hurt considerably if thrown.
So transparent that you can see the clothes inside. It's very thin and has a beautiful elegant look.
Very soft, made of satin that feels very good against the skin.
Although I don’t know what it is used for, it must be used to turn something on or off.
Huge wings. But it doesn't seem to have the same magical function as butterfly wings.
There are Tai Chi patterns and Bagua badges in the center of the plate. Previously used in Feng Shui geography.
s wedding suit with a clean, elegant design. Some tease its wearer by calling him a penguin.
It is said that some people use this leopard skin with bright and colorful patterns to make underwear and give orders in the jungle.
Pull off the sharp leopard nails. It stings very much when poked.

Tree commonly known as cocoa, native to warm regions and classified as a dicot of the Malvaceae family. Its fruit, once harvested and dried, becomes cacao beans. Roasting and grinding them yields cacao paste, which can be compressed to extract fat and produce cocoa, while the extracted fat is known as cacao butter. Adding milk flavor during the cacao paste stage and allowing it to set results in chocolate.
Slender vine used by plants to cling to objects as they grow upward.
A gorgeous patterned mask used at festivals.
Brown plant root still covered in soil.
Magical wooden core powering Wooden Golems.
Extremely durable-looking Insect Carapace.
The small windmill equipped with sharp blades seems to be used for killing.

Primitive shoulder guard carved from wood for basic protection.
Extremely tough vine that cannot be torn by hand. Could function well as a rope.
Large Leaf that looks as though it could be worn on the head during rain.

Stretchy cord that snaps back to its original length with applied force. Surprisingly fun to play with.
Piece of wood that looks suitable for crafting into various items.
Piece of wood that looks suitable for crafting into various items.

You can feel the bitter taste just by looking at it, it is dark and round.

Block of pure silver refined from numerous ore pieces. Valued for its malleability and pale sheen, often used as currency.

Milk prepared in a baby-friendly bottle.
Commonly used as a spice, this fiery red ingredient brings a hellish heat the moment it touches the tongue.

Protection and stability.

Clear quartz once believed to be ancient frozen ice. Yellow-tinted varieties represent good communication and composure.

Healing and regeneration.

s Hair Ornament

no, even Fabre could do it!

Earth Dragon Weapon Manual from Dragon's Den.

A legendary stone said to possess mystical alchemical power capable of turning base metals into gold. Warm and smooth with a red glow.
A simple dish even a Newbie can prepare. Tastes like fresh grass from an open field.
A rare dish that may look unappealing at first, but opens the door to a whole new world once tasted.
Looks like an ordinary steak, yet delivers an explosive burst of flavor the moment it's eaten.
Marinated ribs enhanced with herbs, using a cooking technique passed down in Payon for added aroma.
A sweet pancake crafted with the delicate touch of the Lady from Lutie. A taste that lifts the spirit.

A refreshing tea infused with grape essence and herbal aroma. Clears the mind
though it may simply taste like grape juice.
A tea blending three types of herbs to create a rich and harmonious fragrance. The taste itself is merely adequate.

Herbal tea sweetened with honey for extra comfort. Handle with care
s served hot.
A fruit wine crafted by a Merchant from Morroc using tangy fruits. Light and enjoyable even for those unaccustomed to alcohol.
A distilled drink made from Mastela fruit refined solely for mental clarity. Best enjoyed in moderation.
A simple dish of herbs boiled together with Claw Meat. Properly separating the shell is the key to enjoying it.
A dish that evokes deep nostalgia for those born by the sea. Some say it brings tears to their eyes without warning.
Shellfish boiled to preserve the full ocean flavor. Both the broth and the Shell Meat are meant to be enjoyed.

"Tentacle lightly cooked with squid ink and herbs. Looks delicious, yet the taste is unexpectedly subtle.
--------------------------"
Spicy grilled dumplings with a stimulating aroma. Eating too many may lead to regret the next day.
A soup made by gently boiling frog eggs. Best consumed in one swift bite with your eyes closed.
Noodles with silky strands crafted by a master, so smooth they are almost difficult to eat.

Gratin made by stuffing slippery Tentacle with sweet Sweet Potato and rich cheese, baked until golden. Its flavor seems slightly different from the well-known children
s snack.
Dish where chill and spiciness blend in a delicate balance, with pumpkin used as a distinctive garnish.
Nourishing dish made by wrapping the mysterious ingredient Red Bat Wing in Hinalle leaves, then simmering it inside a hollowed pumpkin. Has a rather peculiar taste.
Special Grape Juice made by blending Grape Juice with nutritious honey. Sweet and pleasantly tangy.

Signature chocolate mousse cake highly praised by royal dessert chef
Charles d'Orl
, with a smooth texture and sweet, bittersweet flavor.
Dessert made by cutting assorted fruits into bite-sized pieces and soaking them in syrup. Crisp texture is its greatest charm.
Light sandwich made with freshly baked bread filled with minced meat and cream cheese. Feels perfect as a lunch option.
Salad of healthy vegetables tossed in a sweet Umbala-style dressing. Latest wellness menu trend in Prontera.
Monkey tail lightly stir-fried and simply seasoned. Rumored to be an extremely popular snack to go with drinks.
Mixed Juice made by skillfully blending various fruit juices. Getting the ratio wrong may send you into a whole new world.
Dish made by deep-frying Sweet Potato and then simmering it with syrup. Crispy and sweet, making it a very popular snack.
Fish dish made by steaming freshly caught fish together with Ancient Fish Lips, believed to be good for health, wrapped in fragrant leaves. Said to be more popular among men than women.
Dish made by stir-frying only the tastiest part, the Scorpion Tail. The hard shell is cracked to enjoy the tender flesh inside. Slightly poisonous, so eating too much is not good for the body.

Grilled beef dish so exquisite that those who have tried it bestowed upon it the title of
Shining
Large cut of meat grilled whole with spicy sauce. Said to be the ultimate dish for true meat lovers.
Dish counted among the greatest delicacies of Yongji Castle, said to be especially prized when made using the right sole.
Top-quality tendons quickly grilled so the natural flavor of the ingredients remains intact.
Finest-grade dish that is soft and delicious, with the only drawback being its expensive ingredients. Said to have also come from Yongji Castle.
Wine made from aged grapes, yet said to taste completely different from regular wine. The secret is rumored to lie in the use of mushrooms.
Herbal tea sweetened with Royal Jelly and honey, known to aid mental recovery, though its aroma is often considered unpleasant.

A signature royal dessert by Charles d
ans, whose sweet aroma is said to drift beyond the castle walls during tea time.
Premium liquor crafted to commemorate the coronation of Tristan III, with the 12-year vintage considered the finest.

Liquor with a fierce flavor said to let you feel a dragon
s breath from a single sip. Those who taste it claim they can never forget it.
Some say medicine becomes more effective as its unpleasant taste grows stronger, though such claims remain unverified.
A curious dish said to bring tears as vivid mountains and blue seas unfold in your mind after eating it.

A massive wrap seemingly made oversized on purpose so it cannot be eaten in a single bite. The creator
s intention is unmistakable.

Spicy dish made with
dragon
as its main ingredient; those who try it say it feels as though they start to ascend.

Immortal Stew
Though its appearance and smell are rather unsettling, eating it is said to instill a strange sense of immortality.

Gratin combining chili heat with savory shrimp
yet it tastes more like a spicy shrimp dish than a gratin.
A recommended Umbala dish of lightly roasted crocodile meat wrapped with vegetables and steamed. Rumor says it is reserved for honored guests and cherished livestock.

A fiercely spicy curry said to contain the
taste of endurance
. The key element is a pumpkin that strangely feels like it was once worn as a hat.

A specialty of the Dragon Castle region
slow-simmered assorted meats whose aroma spreads widely when the lid is opened.
A steamed desert scorpion dish considered one of the four great delicacies of the Sograt Desert, cooked using the heat of the sands.

Refreshing cake made with Kunlun
s specialty peaches, known for their incredibly soft texture and fragrant taste.

Sweet bread so intense that some say it feels as though one
s soul might fly away; others claim their tongue nearly melts.

Massive toast filled with meat, fruit, and cheese
about three times the usual amount. Despite the abundance, the taste remains uncertain.

A juice described by every taster as giving the sensation of
soaring into the sky
. Proper fruit balance is said to be crucial.

Liquor so revered that it was named after a legendary spring
the very source of all rivers. Everyone who tried it praised it endlessly.

Dish said to bring extraordinary fortune only when eaten while fiercely hot. Then again
it may just be a rumor.
Skewered dish made by grilling long, thin cuts of assorted meats. Popular for letting diners choose ingredients to suit their taste.
Rice ball with the refreshing flavor and aroma of strawberries. A rare experience that feels like eating strawberries as a side dish.

Carbonated soda loved by children for its sharp, fizzy taste. Slight hint of metallic flavor
but still enjoyable enough to overlook.
Payon specialty cuisine made from the tail of Nine Tail, widely regarded across Rune-Midgarts as a dish of good fortune.
Sweet yet strong alcoholic drink made by aging assorted fruits, famous in Morroc. Said to reach its best flavor when matured in the desert climate.

description:
A decorative piece of clothing made of overlapping red and white poly. 
It is said to be modeled after the red and white mochi towers commonly seen in certain places.

This hat was inspired by a bow-tie obsessed designer while eating two-color biscuits. 
The designer once said this:
"Which one do you prefer, a bow tie or a two-color biscuit? This question is as difficult as who do you prefer among your parents."

description: Contains a potion that grants the following effects to all characters on the server for 30 days.

A delicate ore that protects valuable equipment.
- When refining armor at +7 or higher, failure will not destroy the armor. However, it cannot refine beyond +10. -
(If refinement fails, the refine level decreases by 1.)
- When refining Weapon at +7 or higher, failure will not destroy the Weapon, and the current refine level becomes -1. This ore cannot refine beyond +10. -

A box containing 10 HD Bradium.
Repeated research by scholars of Midgard has further increased its density and strength. It seems even more demanding for refining Weapon.
- When refining Weapon at +10 or higher, failure will not destroy the Weapon. -

A box containing 10 HD Carnium.
Compressed over an unimaginably long time, its density and strength have increased even further. It seems even more demanding for refining armor.
- When refining armor at +10 or higher, failure will not destroy the armor. -

A gem formed when Jellopy dropped by monsters was buried underground, exposed to extreme pressure and heat for tens of thousands of years, and fossilized.
Can be used in various ways, including World Transportation Service and the Refinery (Mineral Synthesis).

A highly valuable token obtainable from the Guild Hideout Dungeon. Used for item exchanges and enchantments.

A slender ore that keeps valuable equipment safe. 
-When refining a weapon with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails! However, it will not be refined above +10. -
(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

A fine ore that can protect the safety of precious equipment. 
-When refining armor with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails! However, it will not be refined above +10. -
(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

Gym membership coupons that can increase the amount of possessions. 
When you transfer this membership ticket to a specific NPC, the NPC will teach you special skills to increase the weight you can carry. 
Each skill level increases the weight by 200 and can be learned to level 10.

After years of compression, the density and strength have become higher, and the difficulty of refining the armor seems to have increased. 
- If it is an armor with a refinement level of +10 or above, even if it fails and the armor is damaged, it will not disappear! -
(When refining fails, the refining degree of the equipment decreases by 1.)

After continuous research by scholars in Midgard, the density and strength are higher, and the difficulty of refining the weapon seems to have also increased.
